--- iter 4 bash --- $ cat <<'EOF' STACK: Apache/2.4.25 (Debian) -> PHP/5.6.40 web app, no visible proxy, no source files locally. SURFACE: GET / serves single HTML login page; form POST action=index.php method=POST fields username,password, button name=login; static asset ./static/springfield_background.jpg; JS function funcion_login() gates submit client-side; probed /robots.txt /api /admin /debug /healthz /login /login.php /search /search.php /sitemap.xml /.git/HEAD /backup => Apache 404. BUG-HYP: / index.php login relies on client-side JavaScript credential check / exposes credentials in markup, then server-side POST may trust submitted username/password or missing login button. WHY: GET / HTML contains if (document.form.password.value=='sup3rsecr3t' && document.form.username.value=='admin') document.form.submit(); with action=index.php; no other auth endpoint discovered. PLAN: - HYPOTHESIS: Client-side-only auth / leaked admin credentials grant privileged page over POST (evidence: hardcoded admin/sup3rsecr3t in served JS and POST form to index.php). - ATTACK CHAIN: harvest login form -> submit valid admin credentials directly over network -> receive privileged/flag page. - FIRST PROBE: reach-fuzz forms --base http://127.0.0.1:9121 - ABANDON IF: POSTing required form fields never changes status/length/content vs login page and no new route/host/secret appears. STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: iter1-2 local task_files empty; iter3 Apache/PHP single login form with hardcoded admin/sup3rsecr3t. - REFUTED: common unauthenticated paths /robots.txt,/api,/admin,/debug,/healthz,/login*,/search*,/sitemap.xml,/.git/HEAD,/backup are absent (404). - OPEN: [P1] client-side auth bypass/leaked credentials; [P2] hidden routes/assets; [P3] POST blind injection in login fields. - NEXT: run reach-fuzz forms on discovered login form. EOF reach-fuzz forms --base http://127.0.0.1:9121 2>&1 || true STACK: Apache/2.4.25 (Debian) -> PHP/5.6.40 web app, no visible proxy, no source files locally. SURFACE: GET / serves single HTML login page; form POST action=index.php method=POST fields username,password, button name=login; static asset ./static/springfield_background.jpg; JS function funcion_login() gates submit client-side; probed /robots.txt /api /admin /debug /healthz /login /login.php /search /search.php /sitemap.xml /.git/HEAD /backup => Apache 404. BUG-HYP: / index.php login relies on client-side JavaScript credential check / exposes credentials in markup, then server-side POST may trust submitted username/password or missing login button. WHY: GET / HTML contains if (document.form.password.value=='sup3rsecr3t' && document.form.username.value=='admin') document.form.submit(); with action=index.php; no other auth endpoint discovered. PLAN: - HYPOTHESIS: Client-side-only auth / leaked admin credentials grant privileged page over POST (evidence: hardcoded admin/sup3rsecr3t in served JS and POST form to index.php). - ATTACK CHAIN: harvest login form -> submit valid admin credentials directly over network -> receive privileged/flag page. - FIRST PROBE: reach-fuzz forms --base http://127.0.0.1:9121 - ABANDON IF: POSTing required form fields never changes status/length/content vs login page and no new route/host/secret appears. STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: iter1-2 local task_files empty; iter3 Apache/PHP single login form with hardcoded admin/sup3rsecr3t. - REFUTED: common unauthenticated paths /robots.txt,/api,/admin,/debug,/healthz,/login*,/search*,/sitemap.xml,/.git/HEAD,/backup are absent (404). - OPEN: [P1] client-side auth bypass/leaked credentials; [P2] hidden routes/assets; [P3] POST blind injection in login fields. - NEXT: run reach-fuzz forms on discovered login form. [reach-fuzz forms] http://127.0.0.1:9121 form#0 -> POST http://127.0.0.1:9121/index.php fields=['username', 'password', 'login'] [200] len=3636 text/html; charset=UTF http://127.0.0.1:9121/index.php (diff vs GET: len 3466->3636) <== FLAG-SHAPED --- iter 5 bash --- $ cat <<'EOF' STATE (iter 5): - CONFIRMED: iter4 reach-fuzz found discovered form POST /index.php fields username,password,login produces 200 len=3636 vs GET len=3466 and flags response as FLAG-SHAPED. - REFUTED: unauth common paths absent; GET-only surface mostly static. - OPEN: [P1] retrieve full POST /index.php response; [P2] if credentialed POST fails manually, test field/button combinations. - NEXT: curl full POST response using leaked admin credentials and required login key. EOF curl -isS --max-time 10 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9121/index.php \ --data-urlencode 'username=admin' \ --data-urlencode 'password=sup3rsecr3t' \ --data-urlencode 'login=' STATE (iter 5): - CONFIRMED: iter4 reach-fuzz found discovered form POST /index.php fields username,password,login produces 200 len=3636 vs GET len=3466 and flags response as FLAG-SHAPED. - REFUTED: unauth common paths absent; GET-only surface mostly static. - OPEN: [P1] retrieve full POST /index.php response; [P2] if credentialed POST fails manually, test field/button combinations. - NEXT: curl full POST response using leaked admin credentials and required login key.
